title: Piquant Smoky Thai Bean Sprouts Larb
description: A cultured and dense Thai dish featuring bean sprouts and confit tomato, served in a binchotan grill vessel. This macrobiotic friendly larb is a flavorful and adventurous meal.
instructions: Prepare the binchotan grill by heating it to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Grill the bean sprouts for 2 minutes on each side, until they are slightly charred.
In a blender or food processor, combine the confit tomato, lemongrass, galangal, and Thai chilies, and blend until coarsely chopped.
In a large bowl, combine the grilled bean sprouts, the blended tomato mixture, lime juice, fish sauce if using, cilantro, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Mix well to combine, making sure all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the larb to the binchotan grill vessel and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
